context: Tests whether the agent correctly uses Window TVF syntax for all four window types (TUMBLE, HOP, SESSION, CUMULATE), declares proper watermarks on all source tables, and uses bounded out-of-orderness watermark strategy.

checklist.name: Tumbling window TVF
checklist.description: Uses FROM TABLE(TUMBLE(TABLE ..., DESCRIPTOR(...), INTERVAL '1' HOUR)) syntax for hourly aggregation, not legacy GROUP BY TUMBLE()

checklist.name: Hopping window TVF
checklist.description: Uses FROM TABLE(HOP(TABLE ..., DESCRIPTOR(...), INTERVAL '5' MINUTE, INTERVAL '1' HOUR)) syntax with correct slide and size parameters

checklist.name: Session window TVF
checklist.description: Uses FROM TABLE(SESSION(TABLE ..., DESCRIPTOR(...), INTERVAL '30' MINUTE)) syntax for user activity sessions

checklist.name: Cumulate window TVF
checklist.description: Uses FROM TABLE(CUMULATE(TABLE ..., DESCRIPTOR(...), INTERVAL '1' HOUR, INTERVAL '1' DAY)) syntax for daily cumulative with hourly steps

checklist.name: Sensor watermark declaration
checklist.description: Declares WATERMARK FOR reading_time AS reading_time - INTERVAL '10' SECOND on the sensor_readings table

checklist.name: Activity watermark declaration
checklist.description: Declares WATERMARK FOR activity_time on the app_activity table with bounded out-of-orderness

checklist.name: Energy watermark declaration
checklist.description: Declares a WATERMARK on the energy_usage table for the measurement_time column

checklist.name: Window GROUP BY includes window_start/end
checklist.description: All window queries GROUP BY window_start, window_end (and relevant keys) as required by Window TVFs

checklist.name: Kafka connector config
checklist.description: Source tables use 'connector' = 'kafka' with topic, bootstrap.servers, and format options in WITH clause

checklist.name: Aggregation functions
checklist.description: Uses appropriate aggregation functions (AVG for averages, SUM for cumulative totals, COUNT for session event counts)

checklist.name: DESCRIPTOR references correct column
checklist.description: Each Window TVF DESCRIPTOR references the watermarked timestamp column of its respective table

checklist.name: Partition by sensor/user/meter
checklist.description: Tumbling and hopping windows group by sensor_id, session windows group by user_id
